---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Seth Watts, PhD"
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: articles
    contents:
      - research/articles
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    page-size: 3
    fields: [date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::: {.hero-section}

::: {.hero-bio-col}

```{=html}
<p class="hero-affiliation">Assistant Professor &middot; Texas State University</p>
<h1 class="hero-name">Seth B. Watts</h1>
<p class="hero-tagline">Studying how technology and innovation shape policing, public safety, and community health.</p>
<p class="hero-bio">I examine how emerging tools — from AI-assisted body-worn cameras to co-response models — reshape police behavior, officer decision-making, and community outcomes. My work sits at the intersection of criminology, public health, and applied policy evaluation.</p>
```

::: {.research-chips}
[Policing]{.chip} [Technology & AI]{.chip} [Body-Worn Cameras]{.chip} [De-escalation]{.chip} [Public Health]{.chip} [Program Evaluation]{.chip}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="hero-cta">
  <a href="research.html" class="btn-primary-custom">
    <i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications
  </a>
  <a href="cv/cv.pdf" class="btn-outline-custom" target="_blank">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person"></i> Download CV
  </a>
  <a href="mailto:sbwatts@txstate.edu" class="btn-outline-custom">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Contact
  </a>
</div>
```

:::

::: {.hero-photo}
```{=html}
<img src="headshot.jpeg" alt="Seth Watts" class="hero-headshot">
```
:::

::::

```{=html}
<hr class="section-divider">
```

::: {.section-heading-row}
## Recent Work {.section-heading}
[All publications &rarr;](research.qmd){.section-link}
:::

::: {#articles}
:::
